{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's stinger
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] uses a bright green stinger.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
